commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed because this broad external Feishu PR lacks real behavior proof and has security/product/account-scope blockers rather than one narrow automated repair.; Needs attention: The PR adds cross-tenant cache exposure risks and a new agent-callable local file upload path.; Review finding: [P1] Avoid timestamp-only stale-message rejection — extensions/feishu/src/dedup.ts:226-227 - [P1] Scope contact c... commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Feishu streaming, dedupe, fast-abort, recall, contacts/groups/send/calendar tools and skills, plus a daemon service working-directory tweak.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers by source inspection: PR-head code shows timestamp-only create_time rejection, unscoped contacts/groups caches, missing account routing, direct-abort claim loss, and broad file-send exposure. No live Feishu behavior was reproduced because this read-only review has no Feishu credentials and the PR includes no after-fix proof.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because this broad external Feishu PR lacks real behavior proof and has security/product/account-scope blockers rather than one narrow automated repair.

target.title: feat(feishu): comprehensive plugin enhancements — streaming, dedup, skills, calendar, and stability
